entity.summary: Taiwan-based centralized cryptocurrency exchange launched in March 2018 by Bito Technology, providing New Taiwan dollar markets and related digital-asset services under the BitoPro brand.
entity.notes: Official BitoPro material places the exchange-platform launch in March 2018. Bito Technology completed Taiwan's new anti-money-laundering registration for virtual-asset service providers in September 2025 and remains listed among the first registered operators.

expected.summary: Taiwan-based centralized exchange launched in 2018 and still operating under the BitoPro brand.

changes.summary: Taiwan-based centralized cryptocurrency exchange launched in March 2018 by Bito Technology, providing New Taiwan dollar markets and related digital-asset services under the BitoPro brand.
changes.notes: Official BitoPro material places the exchange-platform launch in March 2018. Bito Technology completed Taiwan's new anti-money-laundering registration for virtual-asset service providers in September 2025 and remains listed among the first registered operators.

events.title: BitoPro launched in March 2018
events.description: Bito Technology launched the BitoPro digital-asset exchange platform in Taiwan in March 2018.
events.notes: The reviewed official source establishes March 2018 but not an exact public launch day, so the first day of the month is used as a month-level marker.

events.title: Bito Technology completed Taiwan's VASP AML registration
events.description: Taiwan's Financial Supervisory Commission included Bito Technology, the operator of BitoPro, among the first nine virtual-asset service providers to complete the new anti-money-laundering registration required to continue operating.
events.notes: This records completion of the statutory registration framework, not an investment endorsement or guarantee by the regulator.

evidence.title: BitoPro white paper
evidence.notes: Official white paper states that Bito Technology launched the BitoPro digital-asset platform in March 2018.

evidence.title: CoinGecko exchange reference for BitoPro
evidence.notes: Independent exchange profile corroborates the BitoPro identity, Taiwan registration, and 2018 establishment year.

evidence.title: BitoPro completed Taiwan's virtual-asset AML registration
evidence.notes: Official BitoPro announcement states that Bito Technology completed the new AML registration on September 22, 2025.

evidence.title: Taiwan says nine VASPs completed anti-money-laundering registration
evidence.notes: Independent reporting based on the regulator's announcement names Bito Technology among the nine completed registrations.

evidence.title: BitoPro official exchange
evidence.notes: The official domain verifies the current BitoPro identity and active exchange interface.
